zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Thomas於1674年出生在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆時，她的父親John Thomas23歲，母親Mary20歲。她於1699年4月11日與John Bampfield在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Thomas于1674年出生在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆时，她的父亲John Thomas23岁，母亲Mary20岁。她于1699年4月11日与John Bampfield在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国英格兰戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Breton, German, Dutch, Flemish, Danish, Greek, West Indian (mainly Haiti and Jamaica), and African (mainly Tanzania and Nigeria): from the personal name Thomas, of Biblical (New Testament) origin, from Aramaic t’ōm’a, a byname meaning ‘twin’. It was borne by one of the disciples of Christ, known for his scepticism about Christ's resurrection (John 20:24–29). The Th- spelling is organic, the initial letter of the name in the Greek New Testament being a theta. The English pronunciation as t rather than th- is the result of French influence from an early date. In Britain, the surname is widely distributed throughout the country, but especially common in Wales and Cornwall. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages (e.g. Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Toma and Tuma , Albanian Toma and Thoma , and Slavic surnames listed in 3 below), and their patronymics and other derivatives (e.g. Polish Tomaszewski and Slovenian Tomažič; see Tomazic ). In France, this surname is most common in the Vosges and Brittany. The name Thomas is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Machan , Mammen , and Oommen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Thomas (see 1 above) as a surname.

Germanized or Americanized form of Polish Tomas , Tomasz, and Tomaś, Sorbian Tomaš (see also 4 below), Croatian Tomaš and Tomas , Slovenian Tomaš and Tomaž, Czech and Slovak Tomáš, all meaning ‘Thomas’.

variants.name: Maas
meanings: Dutch, Flemish, and North German: from a short form of the personal name   Thomas  .

variants.name: Mashak
meanings: Americanized form of Polish Maszak: patronymic from a short form of the personal name Tomasz (see Thomas ) or possibly of a personal name beginning with Ma-. The surname Maszak is very rare in Poland.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Czech Mašek (see Masek ). Compare Mashek .

variants.name: Maschke
meanings: German: from a Slavic-influenced (see below) pet form of the personal names   Thomas   (compare   Maas  ) or   Matthias  .
Germanized form of Sorbian Mašk, Maška, and Maško: from a pet form of the personal name Domaš or Tomaš (see Thomas 3, 4), or of any name beginning with Ma-.
Germanized form of Czech Mašek (see Masek ) and Polish Maszek, both cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Toma
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Kamal, Nabil, Salem, Kamil, Safa, Samir, Adil, Adnan, Aziz, Bahjat, Basem, Bashar.  Japanese Hiroshi, Takeo, Hideo, Isako, Izumi, Junichi, Kenji, Kiyoko, Masakazu, Rikuo, Sachi, Shigeo.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Toma, an equivalent of Thomas . Compare Tomas .

Italian, French, Polish, Slovak, and Hungarian: from a short, pet, or dialect form of a personal name equivalent to Thomas (Italian Tommaso, French Thomas, Polish Tomasz, Slovak Tomáš, Hungarian Tamás).

variants.name: Mask
meanings: English: unexplained.
German: from a pet form of the personal name   Thomas  .

variants.name: Masino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Ciro, Larraine.
Italian: from a short form of Tommasino, a pet form of thepersonal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Mascio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Gino, Luigi, Paolo, Salvatore.
Italian:
(southern): from a variant of Maso, a short form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ). Alternatively, perhaps from an Italianized form of the Albanian equivalent Mashi.

variants.name: Masel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt.
German: from a pet form of   Thomas  .

variants.name: Masi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Mario, Vito, Carlo, Antonio, Alfonso, Armando, Filomena, Gerardo, Giovanni, Salvatore, Alfonse, Alfonsina, Amato, Anello, Canio, Emilio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Maso, a short form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Masiello
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Rocco, Angelo, Carmine, Franco, Salvatore, Antonio, Carmino, Domenic, Domenica, Francesco, Mauro.
Italian (mainly Naples): from a pet form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Thomas was born in 1674, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Thomas, was 23 and her mother, Mary, was 20. She married John Bampfield on 11 April 1699, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She was buried in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Thomas est née en 1674, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thomas, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Bampfield le 11 avril 1699, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elleenterrée à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Thomas 1674 in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Thomas 23 und ihre Mutter Mary 20. Sie hat am 11. April 1699 in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom John Bampfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie wurde in Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Thomas è nata il nel 1674 nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Thomas, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Mary, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Bampfield il 11 aprile 1699, nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Fu sepolta a Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Thomasが1674年にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベで生まれた時，父John Thomasは23歳，母Maryは20歳であった。1699年4月11日にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベでJohn Bampfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Thomas(이)가 1674년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Thomas(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1699년 4월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 John Bampfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Thomas родилась в 1674 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Thomas было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mary, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bampfield 11 апреля 1699 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она была похоронена в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания.
